name: agent-toolkit-brain-runtime
description: Vendored Brain runtime for agent-toolkit. Executed via Bun wrappers; agent-toolkit talks to it through the brain CLI boundary.

scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter '@ai-assistant/brain-core' typecheck && bun run --filter '@ai-assistant/brain-builtins' typecheck && bun run --filter '@ai-assistant/contracts' typecheck && bun run --filter '@ai-assistant/router' typecheck && bun run --filter '@ai-assistant/harness' typecheck && bun run --filter '@ai-assistant/memory' typecheck && bun run --filter '@ai-assistant/connector-pi-sessions' typecheck && bun run --filter '@ai-assistant/connector-claude-code-sessions' typecheck && bun run --filter '@ai-assistant/cli' typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --filter '@ai-assistant/contracts' test && bun run --filter '@ai-assistant/memory' test && bun run --filter '@ai-assistant/cli' test
